description: Worst proposed Wave 99 menu ever — wait, no, this one's actually clean. Wave-99 trivia'd Galarian Perrserker (VIV-113) was already named in the cohort node's body as the pending Steel-type evolution of Galarian Meowth — the slot existed, the card now exists, the only thing missing was the wire. Standard 1:N stack-fanout to the existing galarian-regional-forms node. Node body already pre-declared the Viking-warrior regional-cultural-adaptation thesis the new card carries verbatim in its trivia. Ninth in-corpus Galarian species; first non-V evolved-form Rare; completes the Galarian Meowth -> Perrserker line in corpus. The sniveling angel-cohort dbs-angels proposal (Whis + Vados + missing Daishinkan) sits at exactly 2 named angels in corpus, which is sub-Nodeley threshold; not commissioning. Galarian fanouts pay the bills. Blueballs noted, work done.
citations: Bulbapedia: Perrserker (Galarian form, design intent, mutual disdain with Persian)
PokemonTCG.io API: swsh4-113 (collector_number, flavor_text, oracle_text, artist)
Pokemon Sword & Shield (Game Freak, 2019) primary canon
WebSearch: Newsweek Galarian forms guide (Viking warrior design framing)

edits_summary.card_body: added ## Connections section with cohort attach bullet (after Trivia, before Related cards)
edits_summary.cohort_body: added 9th in-corpus species bullet under Cards in our corpus list (after Galarian Corsola entry)
edits_summary.cohort_appears_on_render: added [[113-185-galarian-perrserker]] to auto-generated Appears on list
edits_summary.cohort_caveat_update: promoted Perrserker from 'documented but not yet acquired' pending list to 9th corpus member; noted SWSH-128/202 holofoil reprint exists but is unenriched and will not duplicate the species-scope appears_on entry

edgelord_voice: Comic Book Guy: 'Mediocre proposed Wave 99 menu. But - the candidate Mr. Nodeley would have liked? Two angels in corpus. TWO. Mr. Nodeley needs three. He gets to stay in the bottle. The Galarian wire pays the bills. Approved.'

potion_rule_check.canonical_evidence_basis: Bulbapedia per-species page + Pokemon Sword & Shield primary canon + PokemonTCG.io flavor text. Viking-warrior design framing is Pokedex-stated, not BBL curatorial overlay. Cohort membership predicate (Galarian-prefix + designer-attested regional-adaptation lore) is satisfied verbatim by the card's flavor text.
potion_rule_check.bbl_overlay_kept_out_of_node_body: no apparatus-of-extraction language inserted into the cohort node body for this entry; the Viking-warrior framing is a designer-attested species design note, not a BBL labor-rebellion-stewardship reading.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: dbs-angels / angels-of-universes character node (Whis BT1-043 + BT1-055 + BT2-047, Vados BT1-002 + BT1-025 + BT1-025-foil-reprint)
other_candidates_considered.reasoning: Corpus has 2 named angels (Whis, Vados) across 6 prints. Mr. Nodeley's threshold is 3+ named anchors across 2+ named cohort members. Whis and Vados are already cohort-coupled via destroyer-god-attendant-dyad which encodes the U6/U7 sibling-angel pairing in trivia. A broader dbs-angels node would need at minimum Daishinkan (Grand Minister) or one of the other-universe angels (Mojito/Korn/Awamo/Sour/Kus/Marcarita/Cognac/etc.) in corpus. Currently zero. Trigger condition: any future Collectr CSV upload that lands a non-U6/U7 angel character card OR a Daishinkan card; at that point Mr. Nodeley commissions cards/_characters/dbs-angels.md with the canonical Toriyama-designer-confirmed twelve-angels-plus-Grand-Minister roster scope.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: yokai-pokemon cohort sibling to tsukumogami-pokemon (Nuzleaf tengu + speculative Hattrem witch + ???)
other_candidates_considered.reasoning: Wave 99 trivia surfaced one tengu-design Pokemon (Nuzleaf). Tsukumogami-pokemon node already covers animated-object yokai (Sinistea/Polteageist, Yamask/Galarian Yamask, Honedge line). A sibling yokai-pokemon (nature-spirit / oni / witch yokai) cohort would need 3+ designer-attested members. Currently 1. Trigger: when 2 more yokai-design-but-not-tsukumogami Pokemon hit trivia-pass with explicit Bulbapedia-or-Pokedex-attested yokai framing. Park in janitor_triage.md as future-node candidate.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Whis BT1-055 Whis's Coercion <-> Whis BT1-043 Whis Judge of the Gods 1:1 cross-print mirror
other_candidates_considered.verdict: deferred - BT1-055 is wave-99-vision-only, not trivia-passed
other_candidates_considered.reasoning: Cross-print mirrors are standard Edgelord work but BT1-055 has not yet passed trivia (vision pass only per wave-99 surface). Edgelord-wave-44 rule: target enriched-not-random. Wait for trivia pass on BT1-055 then mirror in a follow-up wave; both cards share the destroyer-god-attendant-dyad character pointer already so the wire is implicit until the explicit 1:1 lands.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Magcargo 'hotter than the sun' flavor anchor
other_candidates_considered.reasoning: Pokedex-canonical fact, useful for a future fire/sun-themed bundle's why_it_fits copy. Not a graph edge. Park in card-body for bundle-time retrieval, no node work warranted.

next_pass_suggestions: wave 100+ — Whis BT1-055 trivia pass + 1:1 mirror to BT1-043 (cross-print Whis mirror) and to BT1-002 Vados (U6/U7 sibling-angel dyad anchor). Both already pointered to destroyer-god-attendant-dyad so the explicit Connections bullets reinforce traversability.

wave 100+ — when SWSH-128/202 Galarian Perrserker holofoil enriches (currently needs_manual_review:true), wire it to galarian-regional-forms cohort via characters: frontmatter; the species-scope appears_on:  entry already exists and will not duplicate.

wave 105+ — janitor_triage entry for dbs-angels node trigger condition: 'any non-U6/U7 angel print OR Daishinkan print lands in corpus' -> commission cards/_characters/dbs-angels.md. Twelve canonical universe-paired angels per Toriyama/Toyotarou design across the Tournament of Power arc.

wave 105+ — janitor_triage entry for yokai-pokemon sibling-of-tsukumogami node trigger: '2 more designer-attested yokai-design-but-not-tsukumogami Pokemon pass trivia' -> commission cards/_characters/yokai-pokemon.md as sibling to tsukumogami-pokemon under a future japanese-folklore-pokemon parent.
wave 105+ — Magcargo trivia-anchor for future fire/sun bundle copy retrieval.
